data.name: vaultPathTextBox.ToolTip
data.value: Allows changing of the vault path. Changing this item will cause the vault list to be reloaded with the new path and Main Vault will be loaded from the new path. If Main Vault does not exist it will be created.

data.name: EnableItemRequirementRestrictionCheckBox.ToolTip
data.value: (Experimental) Display a red background color on items when the selected character does not meet the requierements. TQVaultAE doesn't know the math requiered to compute accurately the real strength, dexterity and intelligence of a character the same way as the game does.
